chapter_title.en: Chapter 107 – The merits for the poor Muslims

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (358/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (358/ 9)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كُلَّمَا ازْدَادَ الْعَبْدُ إِيمَاناً ازْدَادَ ضِيقاً فِي مَعِيشَتِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Dawood Al Haza’a, from Muhammad Bin Sagheer, from his grandfather Shuayb, from Mufazzal who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘Every time the Emān of the servant increases, the constriction in his livelihood increases’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Muhammad ibn Ali from Dawud al-Hadhdha’ from Muhammad ibn Saghir from his grandfather, Shu’ayb from Mufaddal who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘As the belief of a person increases in strength, his poverty intensifies.’”
